'''The Mishra''' was a [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] in the city of [[Ilic]] on [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]]. It was located three levels down from the top of the city, and was attached to a theatre somewhat like the old [[Grandis Mon theater]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and a grudgingly participative [[Niles Ferrier]] resolved a dispute between a Barabel and a Rodian at the tapcafe; it was a mention of this incident which later brought [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and Lando Calrissian back to New Cov for another meeting with Ferrier.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Dark Force Rising 2|''Dark Force Rising'' 2]] {{1stp}}
